Open enemy effects guide

Equipment

  • Ship sprite/base stats: Enemy Renegade Spy-1 Enemy Renegade Spy-1
  • Engine: Player Spy-1
  • Loot: Toxic Waste, Radiated Junk, Big Metal Scrap, Hydrogen Spill, Metal Scrap, Artifact 100% (100% artifact chance), Crate Infested Missiles 0.5%, Crate Steel 1-2k, Crate Steel 200-600, Shruiken 0.5%
  • Weapon: Enemy Infested Missiles range 0-2000
  • Weapon: Enemy Elite Gatling Gun range 0-600
